summary.volDesc: Market in long-gamma regime — dealers suppressing volatility. Premium selling favored.
summary.dealerSummary: Dealers net long delta — sell-rally pressure across markets

signals.title: Long Gamma Regime — NIFTY
signals.desc: Net GEX = +581.1Cr. Dealers LONG gamma: volatility suppression. Expect range-bound price; premium selling favored.

signals.title: Dealers Long Delta — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer net delta: +8,090,716 contracts. Dealers will sell into rallies — capping upside. Best to sell CEs near resistance.

signals.title: Zero-Gamma Level Close — NIFTY @ ₹23,782
signals.desc: Spot within 0.1% of zero-gamma (23,782). Crossing this level could trigger accelerated moves as dealer hedging flips direction.

signals.title: Dealer Flip Level @ ₹23,775 — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer delta flips at ₹23,775 (0.1% away). Crossing this triggers forced directional hedging — potential for sharp acceleration.

signals.title: IV Elevated — NIFTY: 22.1%
signals.desc: ATM IV at 22.1% — options richly priced. Sell premium via iron condors or spreads. Avoid naked option buying.

signals.title: Fresh Put Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: PE OI at ₹23,000 growing +19% today (99,178 OI). Strong support floor — sell PE spreads below this level.

signals.title: Long Gamma Regime — BANKNIFTY

signals.title: Fresh Put Writing — BANKNIFTY @ ₹55,000

signals.title: Fresh Call Writing — BANKNIFTY @ ₹56,000
